label: TestingCatalog ChatGPT feed
title: OpenAI launches visual product discovery in ChatGPT for all users
description: OpenAI is rolling out a new ChatGPT shopping experience that lets users browse, compare, and get product insights from major retailers in a single visual chat.
excerpt: OpenAI launches visual product discovery in ChatGPT for all users OpenAI is rolling out a new ChatGPT shopping experience that lets users browse, compare, and get product insights from major retailers in a single visual chat. OpenAI launches GPT-5.4 mini and GPT-5.4 nano on APIs OpenAI introduces GPT-5.4 mini for faster, cost-efficient coding copilots, automation, and agent systems, now available in API, Codex, and ChatGPT. GPT-5.4 nano is now available via the API as well. ICYMI: OpenAI adds interactive math & science tools to ChatGPT OpenAI is adding interactive math and science modules to ChatGPT, letting users adjust variables and visualize equations across 70+ core topics worldwide. OpenAI releases GPT-5.4 model on ChatGPT and Codex OpenAI launches GPT-5.4, a powerful AI model with improved reasoning, coding, and multimodal skills, now integrated in ChatGPT and the API. OpenAI launches Codex app for Windows on Microsoft Store OpenAI launches its native Codex app for Windows, tailored for agentic coding with PowerShell integration and robust sandboxing, available via Microsoft Store.
